LanguageData.UB_SNS_OilMiner.title: Union miner
LanguageData.UB_SNS_OilMiner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen in a workers lottery to be granted the privilege of working on a oil-rich meteor mining outpost. The hours were long, the pay meager, and the work was intensive, but [PAWN_nameDef] got by. The Dangerous conditions of the mining outpost caused concern among the miners, and they quickly unionized, with [PAWN_nameDef] leading it.
